recommendations.title: Human
recommendations.overview: A collection of stories about and images of our world, offering an immersion to the core of what it means to be human. Through these stories full of love and happiness, as well as hatred and violence, it brings us face to face with the Other, making

recommendations.title: The Fear of 13
recommendations.overview: After 23 years on Death Row a convicted murderer petitions the court asking to be executed, but as his story unfolds, it becomes clear that nothing is what it seems.

recommendations.title: Ballet Mécanique
recommendations.overview: A pulsing, kaleidoscope of images set to an energetic soundtrack. This is a world in motion, dominated by mechanical and repetitive images, with a few moments of solitude in a garden.

recommendations.title: Squid Game: Making Season 2
recommendations.overview: From set designs to character arcs, get exclusive cast and director interviews on how Season 2 of the globally most-watched series was brought to life.

recommendations.title: Metamorphosis
recommendations.overview: An evil spirit that changes faces infiltrates one family placing one brother in danger while the other tries to save him.

recommendations.title: Into the Abyss
recommendations.overview: We do not know when and how we will die. Death Row inmates do. Werner Herzog embarks on a dialogue with Death Row inmates, asks questions about life and death and looks deep into these individuals, their stories, their crimes.

recommendations.title: Sans Soleil
recommendations.overview: A woman narrates the thoughts of a world traveler, meditations on time and memory expressed in words and images from places as far-flung as Japan, Guinea-Bissau, Iceland, and San Francisco.

recommendations.title: The Social Dilemma
recommendations.overview: This documentary-drama hybrid explores the dangerous human impact of social networking, with tech experts sounding the alarm on their own creations.

recommendations.title: Koyaanisqatsi
recommendations.overview: Takes us to locations all around the US and shows us the heavy toll that modern technology is having on humans and the earth. The visual tone poem contains neither dialogue nor a vocalized narration: its tone is set by the juxtaposition of images and

recommendations.title: No Half Measures: Creating the Final Season of Breaking Bad
recommendations.overview: A documentary about the making of season five of the acclaimed AMC series Breaking Bad.
